attributes.action: Make St George’s Day a bank holiday in England
attributes.additional_details: I would like the government to promote English patriotism by making St George’s day a bank holiday in England. England is one of the only places in the world without a national holiday and it’s a shame the Northern Ireland get the 12 and st Patrick’s off and us English get nothing
attributes.background: I would like the government to make April 23rd which is St George’s Day a bank holiday in England.

rejection.details: Make St George’s Day a national bank holiday in England every year: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/768153
